query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_orders,
  COUNT(paymentDate) as orders_with_payment_date,
  COUNT(classDate) as orders_with_class_date,
  MIN(paymentDate) as min_payment_date,
  MAX(paymentDate) as max_payment_date,
  MIN(classDate) as min_class_date,
  MAX(classDate) as max_class_date
FROM orders WHERE status != 'cancelled';
